home.whyTitle: Why Zakai and not the other ways?

alone.title: Doing it yourself
points: An hour on hold, then a retention rep trained against you
You must know what to ask, market prices, and your legal rights
Most people give up after one try — and keep overpaying

services.title: Traditional bill-cutting services
points: Fees up to 35% of your annual savings
Human back-office: days-weeks, business hours only
You hand over everything, with no way to verify what's done in your name

zakai.title: Zakai
points: Fee only on documented savings — 18% of the monthly saving; no saving, no pay
Instant 24/7 analysis, power of attorney with a public verification code, 14-day dispute
Free no-signup toolset: 55 rights, electricity, flights, subscriptions
Privacy by default: no trackers, in-browser scans, one-click deletion

home.proof: Documented monthly savings Zakai has achieved so far, across {count} completed checks. Straight from the proof ledger — never typed in.

flow.dropTitle: Upload a photo of your mobile bill
flow.dropSub: Drag it here or click — analysis starts instantly
flow.analyzingSub: Detecting provider, amount and savings opportunity
flow.readError: Couldn't read the image. Try a clearer one or enter manually.
flow.aiUnavailable: The analysis service is currently unavailable. You can enter the details manually and continue.
flow.marketContext: Typical range for a similar plan
flow.strategyTitle: What Zakai plans to ask for
flow.draftTitle: The request sent on your behalf
flow.draftNote: This is exactly what will be sent to the provider. You approve it before it goes out.
flow.editDraft: Want to change something? Edit the text
flow.consentLabel: I authorize Zakai to act on my behalf with
flow.consentLabel2: regarding this matter, as described above. This authorization is recorded with a timestamp.
flow.sentSub: Zakai now tracks the provider's reply. When it arrives, update the new amount here to document the saving.
flow.trackSub: When you get a reply (or a new bill), enter the new monthly amount here. Zakai compares it to the documented original.
flow.feeExplain: You pay only because it worked. No saving, no fee.
flow.noSaving: No saving was documented for this request — so there is no fee. You can try another provider or plan.
flow.caseLimit: You've reached your plan's active-check limit. Finish an existing check or upgrade your plan.

verify.title: Verification before acting
verify.sub: Before Zakai acts for you, we confirm two things — that the account is really yours, and that there's a documented authorization the provider can check. This is what makes a rep take the request seriously.
verify.ownershipSub: We sent a 6-digit code to {phone}. Enter it to confirm the account is yours.
verify.ownershipDevNote: Dev mode: the code is written to the system Outbox instead of being sent by SMS.
verify.codeInvalid: Wrong or expired code. Try again.
verify.codeExpired: The code expired. Request a new one.
verify.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code in a few minutes.
verify.authSub: Zakai generates a formal power-of-attorney-style authorization for you, with a unique verification code. It is attached to the request, and the provider can open the link to confirm the authorization is genuine and active.
verify.bothRequired: Both verifications must be completed to continue.

authorizationDoc.docTitle: Power of Attorney for Action Toward a Provider
authorizationDoc.subtitle: Authorization document — Zakai service
authorizationDoc.scopeBody: The principal authorizes Zakai to contact the provider named above on their behalf, regarding review of the monthly charge and its reduction or plan adjustment, and to conduct the necessary correspondence for that purpose. This authorization is limited to this matter only, and does not include entering new transactions, changing payment methods, or disclosing sensitive information beyond what is needed for identification.
authorizationDoc.disclosure: Zakai is an automated digital agent acting on the customer's behalf. Zakai does not impersonate the customer. The provider is welcome to contact the customer directly using the details in this document.
authorizationDoc.verifyBody: To confirm this document is genuine and active, scan the code or go to the following address and enter the verification code:

verifyPage.title: Verify a Zakai authorization document
verifyPage.sub: If you received a request from Zakai on a customer's behalf, you can confirm here that the authorization is genuine and active.
verifyPage.notFound: No authorization document found for this code.
verifyPage.revoked: This authorization document has been revoked and is not active.

legal.agree: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
legal.termsNote: Sample wording for a prototype. A commercial version requires drafting by a lawyer.
terms: Zakai is an automated tool that drafts and sends requests on the user's behalf, with explicit per-request authorization. No outcome or saving is guaranteed.
The success fee (18%) is charged only from documented actual savings (a documented difference between the original and new amount). No documented saving — no charge.
Every request discloses to the provider that Zakai is a digital agent acting for the customer with authorization. Zakai never impersonates the customer.
Before any action on your behalf, Zakai verifies your account (a code to your registered phone) and generates an authorization document with a code the provider can check.
Your data is processed only for the service, encrypted, and never sold to third parties.
The service is not legal, financial or insurance advice, and does not claim to be a negotiation expert.

trustPage.title: Security & Trust
trustPage.intro: Zakai is built around trust: we act on your behalf toward companies and handle sensitive financial data. This page explains, transparently, how we protect your data and how the fee model works.
security: Encryption in transit: all communication with the site is encrypted over HTTPS/TLS, with an HSTS policy that enforces a secure connection.
Encryption at rest: data is stored in a managed database with storage-layer encryption.
Secrets & keys: API keys and secrets are never in the code — they are injected only as secure environment variables.
Verification codes: the SMS ownership code is stored hashed only (never in the clear), with expiry and an attempt cap.
Rate limiting: login, signup and code-sending endpoints are rate-limited to prevent abuse.
Monitoring: system errors are logged and monitored so issues are detected and fixed quickly.
Dependency scanning: software dependencies are scanned automatically for known vulnerabilities.
trust: We charge an 18% fee only from documented actual savings (a documented difference between the original and new amount). No saving — no charge.
Every request is sent only after your explicit approval, and after account-ownership verification plus an authorization document with a code the company can check.
Every request discloses to the company that Zakai is a digital agent acting on your behalf — we never impersonate you.
No overblown promises: Zakai is an automated tool that drafts and sends requests, not an 'expert' with human experience.
trustPage.dispute: When a fee is charged, we email you an automatic confirmation with a full breakdown (original amount, new amount, saving and fee). If you believe the saving did not actually materialize, you have {days} days from receiving the email to contact us for review — and if the saving turns out not to have taken effect, the fee is cancelled or refunded. Contact: {email}
trustPage.contact: Found a security issue or have a question? We'd like to hear from you: {email}
trustPage.disclaimer: This document describes the prototype's security and trust policy. A commercial version will be accompanied by full legal documents (Terms of Use and Privacy Policy) drafted by a lawyer. Nothing here is legal advice.

referral.title: Refer a friend
referral.subtitle: Invite friends to Zakai. After each friend's first successful check through your link, you get a {amount} credit applied automatically to your next success fee.
referral.creditNone: No credit yet — invite a friend to start earning.
referral.note: Credit only reduces a future fee; it is never paid out in cash.

pricing.subtitle: Start free with a success fee only. Subscriptions buy the fee down — and on Max, every shekel saved stays yours.
pricing.billingNote: Plan changes take effect immediately. Subscription billing starts once payments are connected — until then plans are active with no subscription charge, and success fees are recorded per the selected plan.

features: One active check at a time
An agent acting for you with a verified authorization
Pay only on a documented saving

PRO.name: Pro
features: Up to 5 active checks in parallel

scan.title: What am I paying for?
scan.subtitle: Paste or upload your card/bank statement export (CSV) — Zakai detects recurring charges: mobile, TV, insurance and subscriptions you forgot about.
scan.privacyNote: The analysis runs entirely in your browser. Your statement is never uploaded, stored, or sent anywhere.
scan.upgradeSub: The full list is available on Pro and Max.
scan.shotError: Couldn't read charges from that image. Try a clearer screenshot of the transactions list.
scan.exportGuideTitle: How do I get my statement? (per-issuer guide)
exportGuide: Easiest: screenshot the transactions list in your bank/card app and upload it here — Zakai extracts the rows.
Isracard: site/app → charge details → download icon → Excel/CSV.
Max: My charges → pick a month → export to Excel.
Cal: transaction details → download as file.
Or just select rows on the site, copy, and paste here — the parser is forgiving.

assistant.title: My agent
assistant.subtitle: Zakai looks at your data and points to the next thing worth money. The agent proposes — you approve; nothing runs without your explicit confirmation.
assistant.chatOffline: Free-form chat activates once the AI connection is configured on the server. Until then — the insights above are computed directly from your data and always available.
assistant.quotaError: You've reached your plan's monthly question quota.
assistant.chatGenericError: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
assistant.inputPlaceholder: e.g.: How much have I saved so far? What should I check next?
assistant.disclaimer: The agent answers from your own data only, never executes actions itself, and is not legal, financial, or insurance advice.

insights.pendingCase: {count, plural, one {You have a recommendation awaiting approval} other {You have # recommendations awaiting approval}} — {potential}/month in potential savings already identified, one confirmation away.
insights.awaitingReply: {count, plural, one {One request was sent to the provider and awaits a reply} other {# requests were sent to the provider and await replies}}. When it arrives, record the new amount to document the saving.
insights.firstCheck: You haven't run a check yet. Uploading one bill takes a minute — and that's all it takes to know if you're overpaying.
insights.proPaysOff: You've paid {fees} in success fees so far. Pro costs {price}/month and halves the fee — at your volume it already pays for itself.
insights.savedSoFar: Your documented saving: {monthly}/month — {yearly} a year. Worth checking your other bills too.
insights.invite: No active checks right now. Invite a friend — after their first successful check you'll earn a credit toward your next fee.
insights.recheck: {count, plural, one {It's been over 6 months since your documented saving} other {# of your checks are over 6 months old}} — promo prices tend to snap back right about now. A one-minute re-check is worth it.

electricity.title: How much can you save on electricity?
electricity.subtitle: Since July 2024 every Israeli household can switch to a private electricity supplier. Enter your monthly bill and usage profile — Zakai ranks the plans by your estimated saving. The math runs in your browser only.
electricity.profileLabel: When do you use the most electricity?
electricity.smartMeter: We have a smart meter (or will install one)
electricity.noMeterNote: Without a smart meter only flat-discount plans are available. Installing one (one-time ~₪260) unlocks plans of up to 21% off.
electricity.effective: Estimated effective discount: {pct}% of the whole bill
electricity.disclaimer: Estimates assume a typical usage profile and public price lists as of July 2026 — verify the exact rate with the supplier before switching. The switch itself is currently done with the supplier; automatic switching via Zakai is in development. Not advice.

flights.title: Flight cancelled or delayed? You're owed money.
flights.subtitle: Israel's Aviation Services Law obligates airlines to fixed compensation, an alternative ticket and assistance — low-cost carriers included. Three taps to know what you're owed.
flights.noticeQ: When were you notified of the cancellation?
flights.noticeShort: Less than 14 days before the flight
flights.resultTitle: What the law entitles you to
flights.refund: Ticket refund or an alternative flight — your choice
flights.assistance: Airport assistance: food and drink, communication, and lodging when needed
flights.notEntitled: In this case the law grants no automatic entitlement. If you suffered real damages, other grounds may exist — keep your receipts.

notes.noticeExempt: With 14+ days notice there is no automatic monetary compensation, but you are owed a refund or an alternative ticket.
notes.shortDelay: A delay under two hours grants no entitlement under the law.
notes.longDelayAsCancellation: A delay of more than 8 hours counts as a cancelled flight under the law.
notes.exceptions: Airlines have narrow statutory exemptions (e.g. extraordinary circumstances beyond their control). Compensation is not automatic in those cases.
notes.indexed: Statutory amounts (2023 base) are index-linked — the exact figure is set at claim time.
notes.eu3h: Under EU case law, a 3h+ arrival delay is compensated like a cancellation.
notes.euExceptions: Airlines are exempt in 'extraordinary circumstances' (extreme weather, certain strikes); ordinary technical faults usually are NOT exempt.

flights.disclaimer: Based on the Aviation Services Law (Compensation and Assistance for Flight Cancellation or Change of Conditions), 2012. Not legal advice. Coming soon: Zakai prepares the full demand for you — ready for you to send yourself.
flights.euDisclaimer: Based on Regulation (EC) 261/2004 — flights departing the EU, or arriving in the EU on an EU carrier. Not legal advice. Coming soon: Zakai prepares the full demand for you — ready for you to send yourself.

letter.title: Zakai prepares your demand letter
letter.sub: A ready letter for you to send to the airline in your own name — with the remedies and amounts the law entitles you to.
letter.name: Full name (as on the ticket)
letter.sendHint: Send it to the airline's customer service email or contact form, and keep a copy.
letter.privacy: Generated in your browser only — details are never sent or stored. Not legal advice.
letter.legal: Zakai is not a law firm, does not provide legal advice, and does not represent you. This is a self-help tool: the letter is a template you review, adopt and send in your own name and on your own responsibility. If the demand is refused or heads to legal proceedings, consult a lawyer.

zakameter.title: How much money is waiting for you? 30-second check
zakameter.flightsQ: Flights cancelled / delayed 8h+ in recent years
zakameter.subsQ: Subscriptions you're not sure you need
zakameter.totalLabel: Estimated money waiting for you this year
zakameter.note: A conservative estimate powered by Zakai's own engines (typical 18% mobile reduction, flat electricity plan, minimum statutory flight compensation, ₪35 per subscription). Not a promise of results.

rights.title: The Big Rights Check
rights.subtitle: 55 rights and benefits in one place — tax, national insurance, arnona, banking, army, family and housing. Answer 8 quick questions and get your list. No signup; computed in your browser.

q.dischargedSoldier: Discharged from the IDF in the last 5 years

rights.quantified: Of these, conservatively quantifiable: at least {amount} a year — plus many whose value depends on your case.
rights.disclaimer: General orientation only — not legal/tax advice; actual eligibility is decided by the competent authority. Amounts are conservative estimates; exact terms on official sites.

tax_refund.title: Income-tax refund
tax_refund.desc: Worked part of the year, switched jobs, or never coordinated tax? You may have overpaid.
tax_refund.how: Free check and filing at the Tax Authority portal, up to 6 years back.

work_grant.title: Work grant (negative income tax)
work_grant.desc: A yearly top-up for low-wage workers — paid straight to your account.
work_grant.how: Check eligibility on the Tax Authority site.

credit_children.title: Tax credit points for children
credit_children.desc: Parents get credit points that lower monthly tax.
credit_children.how: Make sure your employer's Form 101 lists all your children.

credit_degree.title: Credit point for graduates
credit_degree.desc: Finished a degree or vocational program? A credit point applies after graduation.
credit_degree.how: File Form 119 with your degree certificate.

credit_oleh.title: New-immigrant credit points
credit_oleh.desc: Olim get graduated credit points in their first years.
credit_oleh.how: Update your aliyah date on Form 101.

credit_discharged.title: Discharged-soldier credit points
credit_discharged.desc: Credit points for three years after discharge.
credit_discharged.how: Update your discharge date on Form 101 — it's not automatic.

credit_donations.title: Donation tax credit
credit_donations.desc: Donations to recognized charities above the threshold earn a 35% credit.
credit_donations.how: Keep Section-46 receipts and claim via employer or annual return.

credit_pension_deposit.title: Pension deposit tax benefit
credit_pension_deposit.desc: Independent pension deposits earn deductions and credits.
credit_pension_deposit.how: Deposit up to the benefit ceiling and claim in your return.

tax_disability_exemption.title: Tax exemption for qualifying disability
tax_disability_exemption.desc: A qualifying medical disability may exempt income from tax.
tax_disability_exemption.how: Medical committee via the Tax Authority; check retroactively.

child_allowance.title: Child allowance
child_allowance.desc: Paid automatically — verify all children are registered.
child_allowance.how: Check your National Insurance personal area.

maternity_grant.title: Birth grant & maternity pay
maternity_grant.desc: One-time grant plus paid leave for the parent.
maternity_grant.how: Grant is automatic; maternity pay needs a claim.

unemployment_benefit.title: Unemployment benefits
unemployment_benefit.desc: Laid off or finished a job? You may qualify.
unemployment_benefit.how: Register at the Employment Service immediately, then claim.

income_support.title: Income support
income_support.desc: A safety net when there's no sufficient income.
income_support.how: Claim at National Insurance with income documents.

old_age_pension.title: Old-age (senior) pension
old_age_pension.desc: Monthly pension from retirement age, with income supplement.
old_age_pension.how: Claim about six months before eligibility age.

miluim_pay.title: Reserve-duty pay & grants
miluim_pay.desc: Pay per service day plus grants for active reservists.
miluim_pay.how: Via employer/National Insurance; grants in the Miluim portal.

disability_allowance.title: General disability allowance
disability_allowance.desc: Monthly allowance when earning capacity is impaired.
disability_allowance.how: Claim + medical committee at National Insurance.

arnona_income.title: Income-based arnona discount
arnona_income.desc: Up to 90% off by per-person income test.

arnona_oleh.title: New-immigrant arnona discount
arnona_oleh.desc: Up to 90% off the first 100m² for one year.
arnona_oleh.how: Apply at city hall with your immigrant certificate.

arnona_senior.title: Senior arnona discount
arnona_senior.desc: 30%+ off the first 100m², more with benefits.
arnona_senior.how: One-time application with your senior card.

arnona_disability.title: Disability arnona discount
arnona_disability.desc: Significant discounts by disability type and degree.

arnona_soldier.title: Soldier arnona exemption
arnona_soldier.desc: Conscripts get an exemption/deep discount until discharge.

water_disability.title: Extra discounted water quota
water_disability.desc: National Insurance beneficiaries get a larger low-rate quota.
water_disability.how: Verify it appears on your water bill.

bank_basic_track.title: Bank basic fee track
bank_basic_track.desc: By law: a low flat-fee track instead of per-action fees. Most people never switch.
bank_basic_track.how: One notice to your bank — it must comply.

bank_senior_track.title: Senior bank-fee discount
bank_senior_track.desc: Seniors and disabled get 50% off the basic track.
bank_senior_track.how: Ask at your branch or in the app.

bank_soldier_student.title: Soldier/student fee exemption
bank_soldier_student.desc: Soldier and student accounts are exempt from most fees.

credit_report_free.title: Free annual credit report
credit_report_free.desc: One free credit-data report a year — check for errors.
credit_report_free.how: Order at the Bank of Israel credit-data system.

dormant_money.title: Dormant money ("Har HaKesef")
dormant_money.desc: Forgotten accounts and deposits — billions await owners.
dormant_money.how: Free search on the Treasury's Har HaKesef site.

mobile_check.title: Mobile bill check
mobile_check.desc: Typical proactive saving: ~18% of the bill. Zakai does it for you.
mobile_check.how: Upload a bill — we act with a power of attorney.

electricity_switch.title: Electricity supplier switch
electricity_switch.desc: Guaranteed 5–7% flat discount, up to 21% with a smart meter.
electricity_switch.how: Compare in Zakai's calculator and switch — no technician.

electricity_social.title: Statutory electricity discount
electricity_social.desc: Certain benefit recipients get a discounted tariff.
electricity_social.how: Verify it's applied on your bill.

subscription_audit.title: Recurring-subscription audit
subscription_audit.how: Run Zakai's statement scan — data never leaves your device.

insurance_duplicates.title: Duplicate insurance check ("Har HaBituach")
insurance_duplicates.desc: Duplicate health/accident coverage is very common.
insurance_duplicates.how: Free check on Har HaBituach; cancel the duplicate.

pension_fees.title: Pension management fees
pension_fees.desc: Half a percent difference is worth hundreds of thousands by retirement.
pension_fees.how: Check your annual report; negotiate or move to a default fund.

discharged_deposit.title: Discharged-soldier deposit
discharged_deposit.desc: Personal money waiting in a deposit; freely usable after 5 years.

reservist_benefits.title: Active reservist benefits
reservist_benefits.desc: Yearly grants, credit points and more.
reservist_benefits.how: Check the Miluim portal — some require application.

daycare_subsidy.title: Daycare subsidy
daycare_subsidy.desc: Significant income-tested subsidy for working parents.
daycare_subsidy.how: Apply via the Labor Ministry at the start of the school year.

child_savings.title: Savings for Every Child
child_savings.desc: The state deposits monthly; you can double it.
child_savings.how: Choose a track and matching deposit at National Insurance.

senior_card.title: Senior citizen card
senior_card.desc: 50% off public transport, medicine and culture discounts.
senior_card.how: Sent automatically; request it if missing.

heating_grant.title: Heating grant
heating_grant.desc: Yearly automatic grant for eligible seniors.
heating_grant.how: Paid with the Oct–Nov pension — verify receipt.

rent_assistance.title: Rent assistance
rent_assistance.desc: Monthly participation in rent for the eligible.

mortgage_refinance.title: Mortgage refinance check
mortgage_refinance.desc: Rate changes can save hundreds monthly.
mortgage_refinance.how: Get a balance report and compare offers — free.

health_dental_kids.title: Free kids' dental care
health_dental_kids.desc: Preventive/restorative dental care for under-18s is in the health basket — many parents pay privately unaware.
health_dental_kids.how: Book at your HMO's dental clinics; token copay only.

health_glasses_kids.title: Kids' glasses reimbursement
health_glasses_kids.desc: Under-18s get funded or reimbursed glasses/lenses via the HMO.
health_glasses_kids.how: Check the HMO arrangement before buying.

health_er_exemption.title: ER fee exemption
health_er_exemption.desc: With a referral, admission, or defined cases (fracture, birth) — no ER fee.
health_er_exemption.how: Arrive with a referral or claim reimbursement with documents.

work_havraa.title: Convalescence pay (havra'a)
work_havraa.desc: After a year of employment you're owed yearly havra'a by seniority.
work_havraa.how: Look for it in summer payslips; missing = claim it.

work_pension_mandatory.title: Mandatory pension
work_pension_mandatory.desc: Every employee is insured by law — ~12.5% employer contributions.
work_pension_mandatory.how: Verify contributions on the payslip and that you chose a fund.

work_travel.title: Commute reimbursement
work_travel.desc: Employers must share commute costs up to the daily cap.
work_travel.how: Compare the payslip line to actual costs.

work_overtime.title: Overtime pay
work_overtime.desc: Hours beyond the full day/week earn 125–150% — 'global' arrangements aren't always legal.
work_overtime.how: Compare attendance to payslip; systematic gaps are claimable 7 years back.

work_sick.title: Sick pay
work_sick.desc: 1.5 sick days accrue monthly; paid partially from day 2, fully from day 4.
work_sick.how: Check your balance — it's money when needed.

transport_youth.title: Youth public-transport discounts
transport_youth.desc: Youth/student/soldier Rav-Kav profiles cut fares by tens of percent.
transport_youth.how: Update your profile at Rav-Kav stations or the app.

student_scholarships.title: Student scholarships
student_scholarships.desc: Hundreds of scholarships by field, need, residence and volunteering — many go unclaimed.
student_scholarships.how: Check your institution, Mifal HaPayis and student-union databases.

consumer_cancel14.title: 14-day remote-purchase cancellation
consumer_cancel14.desc: Online/phone purchases cancel within 14 days for a full refund (limited deduction).
consumer_cancel14.how: Written notice to the business; the law beats 'store policy'.

consumer_telecom_exit.title: Friction-free telecom disconnection
consumer_telecom_exit.desc: Mobile/internet disconnection must be simple, without exit fines beyond the law.
consumer_telecom_exit.how: Demand in writing; stalling is grounds for a ministry complaint.

mobility_allowance.title: Mobility allowance
mobility_allowance.desc: Mobility impairment entitles a monthly allowance and car benefits.
mobility_allowance.how: Medical committee via the health bureau + National Insurance claim.

legalPages.legalNote: Drafted carefully but not yet attorney-reviewed; full legal review will precede any real charging.

terms.p: Zakai is a consumer self-help digital service: it checks bills and entitlements, builds comparisons and generates outreach letters — and for consumer matters (such as a mobile or electricity bill) it may relay a request to the provider as the user's messenger, with explicit per-request authorization. Zakai is not a lawyer, tax adviser, pension adviser, insurance agent or investment adviser; provides no legal or professional advice of any kind; does not represent the user in any legal or quasi-judicial proceeding; and does not perform acts reserved by law to lawyers. Demand letters and legal checks are self-help templates — the user reviews, adopts and sends them, in their own name and on their own responsibility.

All estimates and recommendations are orientation only. Zakai does not guarantee savings, compensation or any outcome; actual results depend on factors beyond our control. Calculations are based on the data the user enters — wrong, partial or outdated input may produce a wrong result, and responsibility for the accuracy of the data rests solely with the user. Results are not a substitute for checking with the competent body (the provider, the authority, an accountant or a lawyer) or for professional advice.

A success fee is charged only on savings documented in the system, at the rate of the user's plan at documentation time. Users have 14 days to dispute a charge; if the saving did not materialize, the fee is cancelled or refunded.

A subscription (Pro/Max) is a continuing transaction, cancellable at any time from the settings screen with no penalty; cancellation takes effect from the next cycle and does not affect what was already provided. Under the Consumer Protection Law, 1981, a distance transaction carries a 14-day cancellation right from receipt of the service or the disclosure document, whichever is later. To cancel: the settings screen or the support address.

Relaying a request to a provider in consumer matters is done as a messenger only — in the user's name, after ownership verification and explicit authorization limited to that request. The authorization is not a power of attorney for legal representation, does not empower Zakai to conduct proceedings or bind the user, and is revocable at any time — from which point no new outreach is made.
Provide accurate information, use the service only for accounts you own, and make no unlawful, abusive or infringing use.
Zakai may suspend or terminate accounts for breach, abuse or suspected fraud, with notice where possible. Users may delete their account at any time from Settings.

The service is provided AS IS. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zakai's liability is capped at the fees actually paid by the user in the 12 months preceding the event. Nothing here limits liability that cannot be limited by law.
All rights in the service, code, design and content belong to Zakai.
We may update these terms; material changes will be surfaced in the product. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
Israeli law governs; exclusive jurisdiction lies with the competent courts in Israel.

privacy.p: Account details (name, email, phone), information you upload for checks (bills, amounts), and records of actions taken on your behalf. Providing it is not a legal obligation — but the service cannot run without it.

No third-party tracking, advertising or analytics cookies. One essential session cookie only. The public tools — subscription scan, electricity calculator, flight checker, rights check and the Zakameter — run entirely in your browser; their inputs are never sent or stored.

Operating the service only: bill analysis, authorized outreach, savings documentation and fee calculation, security and fraud prevention, and legal compliance. We do not sell personal data or share it for marketing.

Only as required to operate: with the provider being contacted on your behalf (minimum necessary), secured infrastructure vendors (hosting, messaging, server-side AI), or a competent authority under law.
Access, correction and deletion. Account deletion — one click in Settings — permanently erases all personal data, checks, authorizations and history.
Encrypted transport (HTTPS/HSTS), one-way password hashing, hashed expiring rate-limited verification codes, restricted and logged access. Material incidents are reported as required by law.
Data is kept while the account is active or as required by law; deletion erases personal data permanently.
Consent to the terms and this policy is recorded at signup and shown in Settings. Material changes will be surfaced in the product.
Privacy questions and rights requests: support@zakai.example (to be updated). We respond within the statutory timeframe.

miluim.title: Served in the reserves? Let's verify you were paid right.
miluim.subtitle: Hundreds of thousands have served since October 2023 — and most calculations miss the 20% supplement almost nobody knows. Estimate in seconds; the math runs in your browser only.
miluim.salaryQ: Average monthly gross (3 months before service)
miluim.incomeQ: Average monthly insured income (3 months before)
miluim.howTitle: How to actually get the money
howSteps: Employee: your employer must pay your regular salary during service and claim reimbursement (form BL/501).
Check your payslip covers the service period in full — including the supplement. A gap = money your employer owes you.
Not paid within ~3 weeks of the service's end? File a personal claim (form BL/502) on the National Insurance site.
Self-employed: paid directly to you — verify it arrived and used insured income + 25%.
Keep your service confirmations (3010) — they anchor every claim.
miluim.disclaimer: Estimate per National Insurance rules (3-month basis ÷ 90 + 20% supplement). Index-linked daily minimums/maximums may adjust the figure; the NII calculation governs. Not advice. Coming soon: Zakai prepares the forms for you.
